mace_bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
mace_bloodlust.description: While below 50% HP, gain a +2 ATK buff. When you use an attack skill while below 50% HP, restore 5% of max HP.

edward_cape_heat_resist.name: Heat Resistant
edward_cape_heat_resist.description: Reduce damage taken by Heat by 50%

gojo_glasses_predatory_focus.name: Predatory Focus
gojo_glasses_predatory_focus.description: Each time your opponent recovers health, gain that much attack as a buff for 1 turn

chen_sword_cd_mastery.name: Cooldown Mastery
chen_sword_cd_mastery.description: When Ch'en reduces the cooldown of 1 or more of her skills, she gains +2 attack as a buff for 2 turns
